name: london-birthday-trip
description: Mobile-first London birthday trip guide for Tiffany and Collin.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check sw.js && node --check tools/preview-site.mjs && node --check tools/qa-site.mjs && node --check tools/qa-image-assets.mjs && node --check tools/qa-trip-push-reminders.mjs && node --check tools/update-trip-push-reminders.mjs && node --check tools/update-flight-status.mjs
scripts.release:prepare: node tools/bust-cache.mjs && npm run check && npm run test:unit && npm run site:qa && npm run reminder:qa && npm run flight:qa
